title: Cozy Mushroom Creature
bio: Toadstool Tilly is a cozy mushroom creature who naps under fallen leaves and dreams in polka dots. She feels mellow, stitches tiny scarves, and keeps a snail pen pal.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a wide rounded triangle for the mushroom cap. Add a short rounded rectangle stem underneath.
steps.hint: Make the cap wider than the stem so Tilly looks cozy and sheltered.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two oval eyes on the stem. Add relaxed eyebrows and a small peaceful smile.
steps.hint: Keep the face centered on the stem so it is easy to read.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add cap spots, a tiny scarf, cheek dots, little feet, and a small leaf blanket beside her.
steps.hint: Cap spots can be simple circles in different sizes.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the cap, stem, face, spots, scarf, feet, cheeks, and leaf blanket with soft clean lines.
steps.hint: Round the bottom of the stem so it feels like a tiny creature body.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the cap, stem, spots, scarf, cheeks, and leaf. Add a soft shadow under Tilly.
steps.hint: Put a little shadow under the cap to make it sit over the stem.
